flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Trinity Valley Community College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6k → 5.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Trinity Valley Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (24.4% → 27.2%).
